# spectrocloud_registry_oci (Data Source)

  Data source for looking up an OCI registry by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "spectrocloud_registry_oci" "example" {
  name = "my-oci-registry"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the OCI registry.

### Optional

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the OCI registry.
